raw_sql:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date) AS year,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days,
    MIN(end_date - start_date) AS min_duration,
    MAX(end_date - start_date) AS max_duration
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = 'Finance' AND category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year;
template:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date) AS year,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_days,
    MIN(end_date - start_date) AS min_duration,
    MAX(end_date - start_date) AS max_duration
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = ?s AND category = ?s
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('quarter', start_date) AS quarter,
    priority,
    state,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = 'Finance' AND category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY quarter, priority, state
ORDER BY quarter, priority, state;
template:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, start_date) AS quarter,
    priority,
    state,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_days
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = ?s AND category = ?s
GROUP BY quarter, priority, state
ORDER BY quarter, priority, state;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('quarter', start_date) AS quarter,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) AS avg_target_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) AS avg_pct_complete
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = 'Finance' AND category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY quarter
ORDER BY quarter;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('quarter', start_date) AS quarter,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DOY FROM start_date)), 1) AS avg_start_doy,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DOY FROM end_date)), 1) AS avg_end_doy,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM end_date) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date)), 2) AS avg_year_cross,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM end_date) > EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date)) AS cross_year_count,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = 'Finance' AND category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY quarter
ORDER BY quarter;
template:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, start_date) AS quarter,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DOY FROM start_date)), ?n) AS avg_start_doy,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DOY FROM end_date)), ?n) AS avg_end_doy,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM end_date) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date)), ?n) AS avg_year_cross,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM end_date) > EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date)) AS cross_year_count,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = ?s AND category = ?s
GROUP BY quarter
ORDER BY quarter;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('quarter', start_date) AS start_quarter,
    DATE_TRUNC('quarter', end_date) AS end_quarter,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days,
    metric,
    priority
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = 'Finance' AND category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY start_quarter, end_quarter, metric, priority
ORDER BY start_quarter, end_quarter, goal_count DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, start_date) AS start_quarter,
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, end_date) AS end_quarter,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_days,
    metric,
    priority
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = ?s AND category = ?s
GROUP BY start_quarter, end_quarter, metric, priority
ORDER BY start_quarter, end_quarter, goal_count DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    owner,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days,
    MIN(start_date) AS earliest_start,
    MAX(start_date) AS latest_start,
    COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('quarter', start_date)) AS quarters_active
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = 'Finance' AND category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY owner
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY avg_duration_days DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    owner,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_days,
    MIN(start_date) AS earliest_start,
    MAX(start_date) AS latest_start,
    COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC(?s, start_date)) AS quarters_active
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = ?s AND category = ?s
GROUP BY owner
HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
ORDER BY avg_duration_days DESC;

raw_sql:

    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days,
    MIN(start_date) AS min_start,
    MAX(start_date) AS max_start
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = 'Finance' AND category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY end_month
ORDER BY end_month;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) AS start_month,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) AS avg_target_pct,
    ROUND(STDDEV(end_date - start_date), 1) AS stddev_duration,
    MIN(end_date - start_date) AS min_duration,
    MAX(end_date - start_date) AS max_duration
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = 'Finance' AND category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY start_month
ORDER BY start_month;
template:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) AS start_month,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_days,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), ?n) AS avg_target_pct,
    ROUND(STDDEV(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS stddev_duration,
    MIN(end_date - start_date) AS min_duration,
    MAX(end_date - start_date) AS max_duration
FROM flag_31
WHERE department = ?s AND category = ?s
GROUP BY start_month
ORDER BY start_month;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    category,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) AS start_month,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days,
    ROUND(STDDEV(end_date - start_date), 1) AS stddev_duration
FROM flag_31
GROUP BY department, category, start_month
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY department, category, start_month;
template:
SELECT 
    department,
    category,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) AS start_month,
    COUNT(*) AS goal_count,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_days,
    ROUND(STDDEV(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS stddev_duration
FROM flag_31
GROUP BY department, category, start_month
HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
ORDER BY department, category, start_month;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    category,
    ROUND(CORR(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date), (end_date - start_date))::numeric, 3) AS duration_month_correlation,
    ROUND(AVG(STDDEV_val), 1) AS avg_stddev,
    COUNT(*) AS total_goals
FROM (
    SELECT 
        department,
        category,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        STDDEV(end_date - start_date) OVER (PARTITION BY department, category, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date)) AS stddev_val
    FROM flag_31
) sub
GROUP BY department, category
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 20
ORDER BY ABS(ROUND(CORR(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date), (end_date - start_date))::numeric, 3)) DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    department,
    category,
    ROUND(CORR(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date), (end_date - start_date))::numeric, ?n) AS duration_month_correlation,
    ROUND(AVG(STDDEV_val), ?n) AS avg_stddev,
    COUNT(*) AS total_goals
FROM (
    SELECT 
        department,
        category,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        STDDEV(end_date - start_date) OVER (PARTITION BY department, category, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date)) AS stddev_val
    FROM flag_31
) sub
GROUP BY department, category
HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
ORDER BY ABS(ROUND(CORR(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date), (end_date - start_date))::numeric, ?n)) DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) AS start_month,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - DATE '2023-06-30'), 1) AS avg_days_from_jun2023,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - DATE '2022-12-31'), 1) AS avg_days_from_dec2022,
    ROUND(AVG((end_date - start_date) - (EXTRACT(DOY FROM start_date)::numeric * 18.5 / 30 + 160)), 1) AS residual_from_linear,
    COUNT(*) AS n
FROM flag_31
WHERE category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY start_month
ORDER BY start_month;
template:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM start_date) AS start_month,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - DATE ?s), ?n) AS avg_days_from_jun2023,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - DATE ?s), ?n) AS avg_days_from_dec2022,
    ROUND(AVG((end_date - start_date) - (EXTRACT(DOY FROM start_date)::numeric * ?n / ?n + ?n)), ?n) AS residual_from_linear,
    COUNT(*) AS n
FROM flag_31
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY start_month
ORDER BY start_month;
